title: CDIF-4-XAS Implementation Plan
content:
The OSCARS CDIF-4-XAS project is pleased to announce the publication of an extra deliverable (D3) the CDIF-4-XAS Implementation Plan.

CDIF-4-XAS Implementation Plan https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19651219

This document describes the first proposal to integrate the IXAS — and IUCr — recommended formats for X-Ray Absorption Spectroscopy (XAS) data into workflows in the data processing and analysis platform Galaxy using the CDIF-4-XAS profile.

The

title: Shaping the Future of Cognitively Healthy Aging: A Global Survey Initiative
content:
An initiative building on the activities of the 2023-2025 CODATA Task Group Data-driven social change towards a society promoting cognitively healthy aging is currently gathering expert perspectives on cognitively healthy aging — the ability to maintain cognitive functions such as memory, attention, problem-solving, and decision-making throughout aging, while supporting independence and quality of life.

Survey link: https://shorturl.at/XzGrW

The questionnaire takes approximately 10 mi
